# 1-1 shell audit fixtures.
# The test prints these lines before it attempts the current bundle load.
west_outer_wall_gap expect=hit note="wall should seal the west shell edge"
east_floor_overrun expect=miss note="floor should not continue beyond the east shell"
north_outer_wall_gap expect=hit note="wall should seal the north shell edge"
south_floor_overrun expect=miss note="floor should not continue beyond the south shell"
